title: DN40 3DW, Phillips 66 Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/UP3230LR/V021
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Phillips 66 Limited   Installation name: Humber Refinery   Permit number: EPR/UP3230LR/V021   "
